impact: The worker was repeatedly copying an invalid `confidence  1` fragment from supervisor context. This repair makes the next selected task point at known-good Python comparisons, narrows checkbox-27e to one syntactically valid mutation case, and tells the supervisor to repair malformed prompt context before launching more attempts after repeated SyntaxError rollbacks.
summary: Remove malformed confidence-comparison examples from the daemon recovery instructions and task board, and add explicit syntax-first recovery guidance for repeated py_compile failures.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 6 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
